notes: Business errors are identified by code=0 and data.error_code.
RATE_LIMITED may return HTTP 429; most other business errors return HTTP 200.

errors.description: Platform Open API switch is disabled.
Authorization Bearer or X-API-Key is missing.
The API key is invalid, disabled, or reset.
The API key does not have the required scope.
Withdraw application is not enabled for this key.
Daily endpoint quota has been reached.

tools.name: search_deals
tools.description: Search available product deals by keyword or product URL. Always returns converted deal URLs and supports platform, search_type, sort, cid, price, page, and page_size filters.

platform.description: Optional platform. tb=淘宝, jd=京东.

search_type.description: Optional search channel. Common: quanwang=全网搜索, all=全站领券, dongdongqiang=咚咚抢, xiaoshi=实时销量榜, quantian=全天销量榜, shishi=实时人气榜, videos=视频抖货, yongjin=红包排行, pengyouquan=朋友圈火爆, price9=9.9元, price19=19.9元, high_commission=超高红包, today=今日上新, tmall=天猫. TB only: gold_seller=金牌卖家, taoqiangou=淘抢购, juhuasuan=聚划算, haitao=天猫国际, jiyoujia=极有家, tmall_market=天猫超市. JD only: jd_self=京东自营, jd_good_shop=京东好店, jd_pingou=京东拼购, jd_delivery=京东配送, jd_haitao=京东国际, jingxi=京喜, jd_market=京东超市.

sort.description: Sort option, matching the admin TKCPS goods search option.

tools.name: convert_product_link
tools.description: Convert a product URL or keyword into current-member commission links.

keyword.description: Product URL or keyword to convert.

tools.name: get_current_member
tools.description: Get authenticated member profile, commission amount, points, growth value, member level, and order statistics.

status.description: 0 pending audit, 1 pending transfer, 2 rejected, 3 paid, 4 canceled.

tools.name: apply_withdraw
tools.description: Submit a withdraw application only. Requires user confirmation. One member can have only one in-progress withdraw application.
preconditions: Call get_current_member first and inspect account.commission for currently available commission.
Confirm amount or all-withdrawable commission with the user.
Check withdraw records when needed; do not submit a second application while one is pending audit, pending transfer, or transferring.
Explain that this API submits an application and does not approve or transfer funds.

amount.description: Withdraw amount in yuan, for example 10.00. Required unless withdraw_all is 1.

withdraw_all.description: Set to 1 to withdraw all currently withdrawable commission.
